name: async_signal_exit
notes: Async event source READ-side: how a user FSM reads the injected world.signal_received field (the SigintSource plugin-as-writer field, CLAUDE.md). signal_received>0 → SHalted + Println + Exit(130). The deterministic transition is captured here; the async INJECTION (SIGINT delivery via sigaction + the awaiter wake) depends on wall-clock/external signals and is outside a deterministic transition fixture — the bigger awaiter sub-project (docs/design/event-sources-as-evident.md). Doubly-witnessed: CurrentRuntime probe sat_exits_on_signal + SmtLib Method A/B.
